title: agrimonia eupatoria subsp. daurica
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria subsp. daurica, also known as Daurian agrimony, is a subspecies of the Agrimonia eupatoria plant, a flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Agrimonia eupatoria subsp. daurica include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering the risk of certain diseases, such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Daurian agrimony include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
